message:
feat(wizard): add copy-to-clipboard to all wizard code blocks (bd-2dkb)

Replace 7 raw <pre>/<code> blocks across 3 wizard pages with
CommandCard/CodeBlock components that include copy-to-clipboard:

- status-check: SSH command, env var exports, source/curl commands
- launch-onboarding: SSH config block
- reconnect-ubuntu: fallback SSH root command

Closes bd-2dkb.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -172,9 +172,7 @@ export default function ReconnectUbuntuPage() {

If you're being asked for a password, try connecting as root instead:

- - ssh root@{vpsIP} - +

Use the VPS root password (the one from your provider), then re-run the installer.

@@ -15,7 +15,7 @@ import { } from "lucide-react"; import Link from "next/link"; import { Button } from "@/components/ui/button"; -import { CommandCard } from "@/components/command-card"; +import { CommandCard, CodeBlock } from "@/components/command-card"; import { AlertCard, OutputPreview } from "@/components/alert-card"; import { WhereAmICheck } from "@/components/connection-check"; import { markStepComplete } from "@/lib/wizardSteps"; @@ -132,9 +132,7 @@ export default function StatusCheckPage() {

If you're in PowerShell or Terminal on your laptop, first run your SSH command:

- - ssh -i ~/.ssh/acfs_ed25519 ubuntu@YOUR_VPS_IP - +

Once you see ubuntu@ in your prompt, you're ready.

@@ -281,8 +279,7 @@ export default function StatusCheckPage() {
  • Create a token with the permissions you need (e.g., Workers, Pages)
  • Add to your ~/.zshrc:
    • - 
    {`export CLOUDFLARE_API_TOKEN="your-token-here"
-export CLOUDFLARE_ACCOUNT_ID="your-account-id"`}
    +

    Then run source ~/.zshrc or start a new shell.

    @@ -301,7 +298,7 @@ export CLOUDFLARE_ACCOUNT_ID="your-account-id"`}
  • Go to Supabase → Access Tokens
  • Create a token, then add to ~/.zshrc:
    • - 
    {`export SUPABASE_ACCESS_TOKEN="your-token-here"`}
    +

    Vercel:

      @@ -458,9 +455,7 @@ export CLOUDFLARE_ACCOUNT_ID="your-account-id"`} This usually means your shell config hasn't loaded yet. Run this command to reload it:

      - - source ~/.zshrc - +

      Then try the doctor command again.

      @@ -471,9 +466,7 @@ export CLOUDFLARE_ACCOUNT_ID="your-account-id"`}

      You can try re-running the installer. It's safe to run multiple times:

      - - curl -fsSL "https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Dicklesworthstone/agentic_coding_flywheel_setup/main/install.sh" | bash -s -- --yes --mode vibe - +
